title: PIM Role Activator CLI Configuration
description: User configuration file for the PIM Role Activator CLI, stored at ~/.pim/config.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

subscriptions.description: One or more Azure subscriptions to manage PIM roles for. At least one entry is required.

name.description: Friendly display name shown in the role selector.

principal_id.description: Your Entra ID (Azure AD) Object ID. Found in Azure Portal → Entra ID → Users → your profile → Object ID. Used to scope PIM eligible-role queries to your identity.

quick_select_patterns.description: Substrings used by the 'g' group-select hotkey in the role selector. Pressing 'g' selects all roles whose scope name contains any of these strings.

cache_ttl_hours.description: How long (in hours) to cache eligible roles before re-fetching from the Azure API. Defaults to 24 when omitted or set to 0.

scope_pattern.description: A Go-flavour regexp with named capture groups (?P<env>…) and/or (?P<app>…) used to extract environment and application labels from scope (resource group) names. When empty, the App/Env columns are hidden in the role selector.

env_labels.description: Maps raw decoded environment values (from the scope_pattern 'env' capture group) to friendly display labels. When empty, the raw captured value is shown as-is.

durations.description: Custom activation duration options presented in the duration picker. Overrides the built-in defaults (30 minutes, 1 hour, 2 hours, 4 hours). When empty or omitted, the defaults are used.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the duration picker.

iso8601.description: ISO 8601 duration string sent to the Azure PIM API.

minutes.description: Duration in minutes, used to compute the local expiry time.
